zones.top: Text placed in upper 25% of image
zones.center: Text placed in middle 50% of image
zones.bottom: Text placed in lower 25% of image

brightness.dark: Image is mostly dark - white text works without gradient
brightness.mixed: Image has both light and dark areas - needs gradient behind text
brightness.bright: Image is mostly bright - needs strong gradient or dark text
